notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza singles on a ground ball to center fielder Tristan Peters.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds out, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Bryce Teodosio. Miguel Vargas scores. Munetaka Murakami to 3rd. Austin Hays to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hays GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hays grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Munetaka Murakami out at 2nd. Austin Hays out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hays rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hays grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Munetaka Murakami out at 2nd. Austin Hays out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi flies out to right fielder Jorge Soler.

notableEvents.label: Jarred Kelenic pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jarred Kelenic strikes out swinging. Tristan Peters steals (3) 2nd base.
